objective: Generate exactly two tutorial deliverables for the Bango: Unchained - Bango&Patoot hybrid DODOGame pipeline: one low-risk prototype tutorial and one stronger final-game preview tutorial.

generation_rules.enemy_contract: Both tutorials must use the three nightmaresludgebio orb-drone archetypes: scout, mire, horror.
generation_rules.control_contract: Both tutorials must expose movement, jump or sprint movement pressure, dodge, light attack, heavy attack, block, parry, focus, heal, and special release.
generation_rules.support_dread_contract: The final preview tutorial must encode Patoot-heavy support, lighter Bango lead presence, and an encroaching dread field as readable gameplay telemetry rather than ambiguous lore-only text.
generation_rules.delivery_contract: PlayNOW runtime manifests, finalstage manifests, and DODOGame handoff data must all reference the same two tutorial deliverables.
generation_rules.asset_budget_contract: The dedicated tutorial duology art pass must target exactly 8000 planned credits.
generation_rules.traceability_contract: Every asset entry must carry a stable trace_id, budget bucket, deliverable tags, and stage lineage from recraft 2D master through polish, Blender ingest, model or animation binding, and runtime packaging.
